name: Soft Warning Integration
description: Tests that an active process prints a 'Soft Arbitration WARNING' to standard error if its hard duration timeout is reached and the broker forcibly reassigns the lease to another agent (Arbitration Pre-emption).

steps.comment: 1. Agent A requests a short lease (10 seconds)
2. Agent B queues up as a blocker.
Allow broker time to register B in the queue
Send a manual heartbeat to reset the zombie timer before starting the heavy shim process
3. Agent A's shim command runs for 15 seconds. The shim's 10s heartbeat will arrive too late to save it from the 8s zombie limit, triggering a mid-execution kill.
4. Wait for the watchdog to reclaim B's zombie lease. B never heartbeats, so the watchdog will force-release B.
